channel.title: OPUS Blog
channel.description: Human Experience Design — thoughts on building tools for people, not users.

item.title: The Color of Nothing
item.description: We spent three weeks choosing a background color. Pure black is a lie, four greys are all you need, and font weight is your real color palette.

item.title: Silence as a Feature
item.description: Most apps are designed to prevent silence from ever arriving. We design for it.

item.title: The Stack Is the Statement
item.description: React, vanilla CSS, Three.js, static hosting. Every dependency is a bet — and we prefer to keep the odds in our favor.

item.title: Ten Principles
item.description: Respect attention. Ship less. Charge honestly. Stay small. These are not rules — they are decisions we made before the pressure arrived.

item.title: Building for the Human Experience
item.description: The attention economy has failed us. Every app fights for your time. We decided to build differently.
